MERGE (cve_2024_28085:CVE {id:'CVE-2024-28085'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_2024_28085.summary = 'Vulnerability dubbed "WallEscape" in util-linux core utilities (Linux) impacting the wall command; fails to filter escape sequences from command-line arguments, allowing crafted messages to inject escape sequences that can leak user passwords and modify terminal/clipboard/command output under certain conditions (e.g., mesg=y and wall setgid).'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_2024_28085.summary = CASE
    WHEN cve_2024_28085.summary IS NULL OR trim(cve_2024_28085.summary) = '' THEN 'Vulnerability dubbed "WallEscape" in util-linux core utilities (Linux) impacting the wall command; fails to filter escape sequences from command-line arguments, allowing crafted messages to inject escape sequences that can leak user passwords and modify terminal/clipboard/command output under certain conditions (e.g., mesg=y and wall setgid).'
    ELSE cve_2024_28085.summary
  END
WITH cve_2024_28085
MERGE (tool_wall:Tool {name:'wall'})
ON CREATE SET
  tool_wall.summary = 'util-linux "wall" command; vulnerable in CVE-2024-28085 (WallEscape) due to insufficient filtering of escape sequences in command-line arguments.'
ON MATCH SET
  tool_wall.summary = CASE
    WHEN tool_wall.summary IS NULL OR trim(tool_wall.summary) = '' THEN 'util-linux "wall" command; vulnerable in CVE-2024-28085 (WallEscape) due to insufficient filtering of escape sequences in command-line arguments.'
    ELSE tool_wall.summary
  END
WITH cve_2024_28085, tool_wall
MERGE (ta_skyler_ferrante:ThreatActor {name:'Skyler Ferrante'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta_skyler_ferrante.summary = 'Security researcher credited with discovering CVE-2024-28085 ("WallEscape") affecting util-linux wall.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta_skyler_ferrante.summary = CASE
    WHEN ta_skyler_ferrante.summary IS NULL OR trim(ta_skyler_ferrante.summary) = '' THEN 'Security researcher credited with discovering CVE-2024-28085 ("WallEscape") affecting util-linux wall.'
    ELSE ta_skyler_ferrante.summary
  END
WITH cve_2024_28085, tool_wall, ta_skyler_ferrante
MERGE (inc_cve_2024_28085:Incident {id:'incident-cve-2024-28085-wallescape'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc_cve_2024_28085.type = 'vulnerability',
  inc_cve_2024_28085.summary = 'CVE-2024-28085 ("WallEscape") in util-linux wall: crafted messages with escape sequences sent via wall can place arbitrary text on other users’ terminals (when mesg=y and wall is setgid), enabling password leakage and modification of terminal/clipboard/command output; observed exploitable on Ubuntu 22.04 default configurations; Debian Bookworm affected; CentOS and Red Hat products not affected.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_cve_2024_28085.type = CASE
    WHEN inc_cve_2024_28085.type IS NULL OR trim(inc_cve_2024_28085.type) = '' THEN 'vulnerability'
    ELSE inc_cve_2024_28085.type
  END,
  inc_cve_2024_28085.summary = CASE
    WHEN inc_cve_2024_28085.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc_cve_2024_28085.summary) = '' THEN 'CVE-2024-28085 ("WallEscape") in util-linux wall: crafted messages with escape sequences sent via wall can place arbitrary text on other users’ terminals (when mesg=y and wall is setgid), enabling password leakage and modification of terminal/clipboard/command output; observed exploitable on Ubuntu 22.04 default configurations; Debian Bookworm affected; CentOS and Red Hat products not affected.'
    ELSE inc_cve_2024_28085.summary
  END
WITH cve_2024_28085, tool_wall, ta_skyler_ferrante, inc_cve_2024_28085
MERGE (inc_cve_2024_28085)-[rel_exploited_in:exploited_in]->(cve_2024_28085)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_exploited_in.evidence = 'Researchers report CVE-2024-28085 ("WallEscape") in util-linux wall can be exploited via crafted messages with escape sequences, enabling password leakage and command/output manipulation under specific conditions.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_exploited_in.evidence = CASE
    WHEN rel_exploited_in.evidence IS NULL OR trim(rel_exploited_in.evidence) = '' THEN 'Researchers report CVE-2024-28085 ("WallEscape") in util-linux wall can be exploited via crafted messages with escape sequences, enabling password leakage and command/output manipulation under specific conditions.'
    ELSE rel_exploited_in.evidence
  END
WITH cve_2024_28085, tool_wall, ta_skyler_ferrante, inc_cve_2024_28085

ON CREATE SET
  rel_involved_tool.evidence = 'The vulnerability impacts the util-linux "wall" command which fails to filter escape sequences from command line arguments.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_involved_tool.evidence = CASE
    WHEN rel_involved_tool.evidence IS NULL OR trim(rel_involved_tool.evidence) = '' THEN 'The vulnerability impacts the util-linux "wall" command which fails to filter escape sequences from command line arguments.'
    ELSE rel_involved_tool.evidence
  END

ON CREATE SET

    ELSE rel_attrib.evidence
  END
